prompt: Use $adonisjs-ai-doctrine to refactor the routing of an existing mixed app. Today `start/routes.ts` holds everything: Inertia pages, a `/api/...` group for internal JSON called from the same browser, a `/api/external/...` group for a mobile client on access tokens, Stripe webhooks under `/webhooks/stripe`, a `router.post('/mcp', ...)` MCP tool server with its own bearer-token middleware, and `router.get('/health/live', ...)` / `router.get('/health/ready', ...)` probes. Split the routes correctly across files and update `adonisrc.ts` preloads.
forbidden_patterns: single start/routes.ts for all five surfaces
